projectDescription: An ASP.NET Web Forms SaaS application that guides business users through a personalized digitalization assessment questionnaire, saves their answers to a SQL Server database, and generates a custom Word document report delivered via email.
keyFeatures: Email-based user registration with privacy policy acceptance
Multi-step digitalization assessment questionnaire with progress bar
Multiple answer types: radio buttons, checkboxes, text, numeric, and memo fields
Conditional follow-up questions (re-questions) based on selected answers
Optional questions support for flexible questionnaire flow
Automated Word document (DOCX) report generation per user
Email notifications on registration and questionnaire completion
Session-based state management for multi-page form navigation
SQL Server persistence of all user answers and profiles
Questionnaire model system supporting multiple configurable questionnaires
publicApiSurface: DALUsuario.UpdateUsuario() — update user profile after completion
DALPregunta.ObtenerPreguntas() — fetch ordered questions for a questionnaire model
DALRespuestaDelUsuario.BorrarAnteriorRespuesta() — remove previous answer before saving new one
DALRespuestaDelUsuario.LeerValoresUsuario() — extract name, phone, activity, numWorkers from answers
Formulario.GenerateInforme() — generate DOCX report for a user
Formulario.EnviarMail() — send registration, finalized, or results email
MySession.Current — singleton session accessor for current user state
